name: next-fastapi-postgres
description: A production-ready boilerplate built with Next.js, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, SQLAlchemy, and Alembic.

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n frontend,backend -c cyan,green "pnpm --dir frontend dev" "cd backend && uv run fastapi dev"
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && uv run fastapi dev
